goal: 实现 agent autonomy stop lines v1

summary.title: 实现 agent autonomy stop lines v1
summary.what: 新增 agent_authority stop-line 模型，支持 team/local autonomy 配置、effective/current boundary 计算，并在 status/preflight JSON 与普通输出中展示。preflight block 会把 current.allowed_boundary 降到 inspect_or_stop；同时更新 Mainline skill、AGENTS 模板和 stub 模板，让 agent 按 assist/handoff/review 边界推进。
summary.why: issue #164 暴露出 agent 对 commit/seal/PR 边界的默认判断不够显式。仓库已有 spec 要求把 autonomy stop lines 做成 advisory、machine-readable 的 Mainline 概念，让 agent 和团队都能看到当前默认可推进到哪里。
summary.user_goal: 根据 https://5zgtgp.0g.hk/ 和最新 spec 实现一版 agent autonomy stop lines，并说明不一致点；解决 preflight overlap 后推送并提 PR。

decisions.chose: 实现 spec v1 的 assist / handoff / review stop lines，并保持 advisory-only。
decisions.rationale: spec 明确 v1 不是权限矩阵，也不做 CLI enforcement；status/preflight 输出是 agent 决策和团队可见性的来源。

decisions.chose: 按 spec 使用 team autonomy = handoff，max_autonomy 缺省回填为 review。
decisions.rationale: 虽然 issue #164 角度我更倾向 first-run 默认 assist，但用户要求 spec 不一致处按 spec；因此实现遵循 D3 / implementation slice。

decisions.chose: status 展示配置 truth 与 effective stop line；preflight 在 block 时只把 current.allowed_boundary 降为 inspect_or_stop，不改变 effective.autonomy。
decisions.rationale: 这匹配 spec 中 hard gates 不改变 effective autonomy、只降低当前可推进边界的语义。

decisions.chose: CLI 不解析自然语言 override，只在 skill/AGENTS 指导 agent 根据当前用户指令解释临时升降级。
decisions.rationale: spec 明确 current-instruction override 由 agent/skill 解释，不能写入 team/local config，也不应在 CLI 内置自然语言 parser。

decisions.chose: 检查 int_7e059249、int_196977b7、int_9b78be92 和 int_6d4ff1ab 后继续。
decisions.rationale: 这些是同文件 overlap 但不语义互斥：PR description hard gate 被保留并强化；dogfood health 配置语义未被改写；AGENTS 只更新 Mainline-managed stop-line 指导；int_6d4ff1ab 已 abandoned 且关注 log stale local draft overlay，本次 engine_test.go 只新增 authority 断言。

rejected.alternative: 把默认 autonomy 改成 assist。
rejected.reason: 这更贴近 issue #164 的 first-run trust shock，但与当前 spec D3 和 implementation slice 不一致，所以未采用。

rejected.alternative: 在 v1 中强制阻止 commit/seal/push。
rejected.reason: spec 明确 v1 advisory-only，不做 CLI permission enforcement 或 Git command interception。

rejected.alternative: 实现 config set/get 或 CLI 自然语言 override。
rejected.reason: 这些都列在 v1 non-goals；当前只读 team/local config 并输出 authority。

review_notes: 验证：聚焦 go test ./internal/engine -run 相关 authority/init/preflight/AGENTS 测试通过；go test ./internal/cli -run TestPreflightCommandIsDailyAndAutoSynced 通过；git diff --check 通过。
完整 go test ./internal/domain ./internal/storage ./internal/engine ./internal/cli -count=1 -timeout 120s 超时，卡在既有 TestContextRetrieval_FilesModeMatchesByPath / git common-dir 路径；新增聚焦测试没有失败。
preflight 曾因 proposed overlap block；已逐项检查并在 decisions 中记录兼容性判断。

architectural_claims: Agent authority is represented as a first-class advisory engine result object surfaced by status and preflight, not as command enforcement.
Team config owns agent.autonomy and agent.max_autonomy; local config may carry an optional local agent.autonomy override capped by the team max.
status reports configuration truth and effective stop line; preflight reports the same authority plus the current boundary after readiness gates.
Mainline agent guidance treats stop lines as the closeout decision framework while preserving hard gates and current user instructions as higher priority.
behavioral_changes: mainline init writes [agent] autonomy = handoff into new team config.
Older configs without [agent] backfill team autonomy to handoff and max_autonomy to review when read.
plain status and preflight print one autonomy summary line when authority is available.
preflight block changes agent_authority.current.allowed_boundary to inspect_or_stop and adds authority-aware recommended_next guidance.

data_model_changes.name: domain.AgentSection
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Missing [agent] values are backfilled on read.

data_model_changes.name: engine.AgentAuthority
data_model_changes.migration_notes: New status/preflight JSON object is additive.

security_implications: No permission enforcement is added in v1; the authority model is advisory and does not intercept Git commands.
review autonomy explicitly stops before merge/release and requires non-main PR workflow in guidance.
migration_notes: Existing configs do not need migration; missing [agent] values are backfilled on read.
AGENTS managed block version is bumped to 22 so repositories can refresh the concise stop-line policy pointer.
